functions.name: extra
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. extra ( slot : int ) → array float{zone} or float{zone,3}.
functions.description: Get the zone extra data in the given slot as an array. Extra variables accessed by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: faces
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. faces ( ) → array int{nzone,6,4} in 3D and array int{nzone,4,2} in 2D.
functions.description: Return an array containing the gridpoint indices of each face of each zone. Indices of -1 indicate a non-existant face. The indicies are relative to the ordering of the itasca.gridpointarray return values.

returns.type: array int{nzone,6,4} in 3D and array int{nzone,4,2} in 2D.

functions.name: fill_pos
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. fill_pos ( data: array float{zone , 3} ) → None.
functions.description: Fill an existing array with the zone centroid location. The array must be the correct shape.

functions.name: flow
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. flow ( ) → array double{nzone,3} and array double{nzone,2} in 2D.
functions.description: Return an array of the zone specific discharge vectors.

returns.type: array double{nzone,3} and array double{nzone,2} in 2D.

functions.name: fluid_prop
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. fluid_prop ( prop_name : str ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the fluid property prop_name .

functions.name: gridpoints
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. gridpoints ( ) → array int{nzone,8} in 3D and array int{nzone,4} in 2D.
functions.description: Return an array containing the gridpoint indices of each zone. Indices of -1 indicate a non-existant gridpoint. The indices are relative to the ordering of the itasca.gridpointarray return values.

returns.type: array int{nzone,8} in 3D and array int{nzone,4} in 2D.

functions.name: ids
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. ids ( ) → array int{zone}.
functions.description: Get the zone ids as an array.

functions.name: in_group
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. in_group ( group_name : str , slot = 'default' ) → array bool{nzone}.
functions.description: Return zone group membership as a Boolean array.

functions.name: live_mechanical
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. live_mechanical ( ) → array bool{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of True/False values, True values correspond to zones which have an active mechanical model.

functions.name: neighbors
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. neighbors ( ) → array int{nzone,6} in 3D and array int{nzone,4} in 2D.
functions.description: Return an array containing the indices of the zone adjacent to each zone. Indices of -1 indicate non-existant neighbor zone. The indicies are relative to the ordering of the itasca.zonearray return values.

returns.type: array int{nzone,6} in 3D and array int{nzone,4} in 2D.

functions.name: overlay_stresses
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. overlay_stresses ( ) → array double{nzone,2,5,6} in 3D and array double{nzone,2,2,6} in 2D.
functions.description: Get a multidimensional numpy array of the zone overlay stresses. Non-existant tets have a stress of zero. The return value is a 4 dimentional array with sub-arrays: zone, overlay, tet (3D) or triangle (2D), stress tensor components. The tensor component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

returns.type: array double{nzone,2,5,6} in 3D and array double{nzone,2,2,6} in 2D.

functions.name: pos
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. pos ( ) → array float{zone,3}.
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the zone centroid location.

functions.name: prop_scalar
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. prop_scalar ( prop_name : str , fill_value = 0.0 ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the property prop_name for each zone. Only properties of type double are supported by this function. If a property is not specified in a zone, fill_value is given for that zone. fill_value is an optional argument and defaults to zero.

functions.name: set_extra
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_extra ( slot: int , data: array float{zone} or float{zone , 3} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the zone extra data in the given slot with an array. Extra variables set by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: set_fluid_prop
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_fluid_prop ( prop_name: str , data: array double{nzone} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the fluid property prop_name with values from an array.

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_group ( membership: array bool{nzone} , group_name: str , slot="default" ) → None.
functions.description: Set zone group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding zone to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.

functions.name: set_prop_scalar
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_prop_scalar ( prop_name : str , array ) → None.
functions.description: Set the property prop_name of each zone. Only properties of type double or vec3 are supported. The input array should be shape (nzone,).

functions.name: set_stress
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_stress ( array double{nzone , 3 , 3} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the zone stresses.

functions.name: set_stress_flat
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. set_stress_flat ( array double{nzone , 6} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the zone stresses. Component ordering in the array should xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: state
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. state ( average : bool ) → array int{nzones}.
functions.description: Get the current plasticity state indicators of all zones. The argument average, if true, indicates that the state indicator will be set if 50% or more of the volume averaged tetra/triangles have that indicator. If false then the state indicator will be set if any tetra/triangles in the zone have that indicator. For more information, see \(zone.state\) FISH function.

functions.name: strain
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. strain ( ) → array double{nzone,3,3}.
functions.description: Get an array containing the zone strain-increment tensor.

functions.name: strain_flat
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. strain_flat ( ) → array double{nzone,6}.
functions.description: Get an array containing the zone strain-increment tensor. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: stress
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. stress ( ) → array double{nzone,3,3}.
functions.description: Get an array of the zone stresses.

functions.name: stress_flat
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. stress_flat ( ) → array double{nzone,6}.
functions.description: Get an array of the zone stresses. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: stress_max
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. stress_max ( ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the maximum (most positive) principal value of the volume averaged tetra/triangle stress for each zone. Note that compressive stresses are negative in FLAC3D/FLAC2D.

functions.name: stress_min
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. stress_min ( ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the minimum (most negative) principal value of the volume averaged tetra/triangle stress for each zone. Note that compressive stresses are negative in FLAC3D/FLAC2D.

functions.name: temperature
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. temperature ( ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the zone tempertures.

functions.name: volume
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. volume ( ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the undeformed zone volumes (in 3D) or areas (in 2D).

functions.name: volume_deformed
functions.signature: itasca.zonearray. volume_deformed ( ) → array double{nzone}.
functions.description: Return an array of the deformed zone volumes (in 3D) or areas (in 2D).
